title: PitchForge Frame Spec
description: Output of Phase P2 (scenario-architect). The single source of truth for every frame body, every timestamp, every animation timeline. The deck-assembler reads this and emits deck.html with no manual edits anywhere.

_brief_run_id.description: Hash or run id of the brief.json that produced this spec — used by /pitch:reorder + /pitch:replay.

color_palette.description: Name of a palette in templates/color-palettes/.

copy.description: Verbatim hero line. Echoed at primary + outro. Never paraphrased.

primary_frame.description: Frame ID where the hero copy renders at full size (typically F4 wow beat).

echo_frame.description: Frame ID where the hero echoes at the outro (typically F11).

split_words.description: Pre-split words for the per-word reveal animation on the primary frame.

accent_word_index.description: Index into split_words that renders in gold italic (the visual accent).

judging_criteria_coverage.description: Which frames cover which judging axis (audited by judging-criteria-auditor for ≥ 2 frames per axis).

delivery_notes.description: Free-form per-frame VO direction (delivery, tone, breath instructions).

frame_id.description: Stable id (F1 / F2 / cover / close / custom). Stays constant across reorders.

position.description: 1-based slot number after reordering. SLIDE_DURATION array is built from these in order.

shape.description: Maps to templates/frame-shapes/<shape>.html. cover and close are deck-shell built-ins.

time_start_seconds.description: Absolute seconds from start. Recomputed by /pitch:reorder.

act.description: Doumont act — drives the tone-editor's rewrite ruleset.

heading.description: On-canvas heading. e.g. 'we don't know what we want.'

heading_accent_word.description: Substring of heading rendered in palette accent color.

meta_tag.description: Small uppercase eyebrow above the script panel heading.

script_h2.description: h2 in the script-wrap panel (the 'big serif' line).

voiceover.description: VO line. May contain ... for bold and ... for italics — sanitized at render.

delivery_note.description: Stage direction for the recording presenter.

tone_note.description: Tonal hint (prosecutor opening / showman + invitation / etc.).

navbar_keys_label.description: Override for the navbar key hint. e.g. '★ OPENING WOW · 10s hold'.

show_echo_ribbon.description: When true, the hero ribbon appears at the top of the slide. Hero + cover + close are typically false.

shape_props.description: Shape-specific slot values. Validated against the shape's own schema at render time.

animation_timeline.description: Ordered list of animation events that drive data-anim attributes + JS engines.

selector.description: CSS-like selector inside the frame — applied to the rendered slide.

options.description: Engine-specific options (counter target/dur/stops, typewriter text/duration, etc.).
